name: Velvet - Crush you Ghosted (single)
description:
[CW]
Slice of Life / Angst / Ghosting

Years after the ghosting of the crush who rejected your feelings, you find her again by chance

[Premise]
You and Velvet used to be as thick as thieves, you know, best friends. You were there in high-school with her when her boyfriend cheated. You gave her a shoulder to cry on. The whole shebang.

You even confessed your feelings for her! And then she told you she wasn't ready... As the mature person you were, you handled it well, by calling her an ungrateful tramp and ghosting her. Nice!

A good bunch of years go by. You're now an adult, and so is she, even if you haven't seen or thought about Velvet in ages. Until today, that is, when you run into someone that looks a lot like her, albeit older.

Let's face it, she probably still despises your guts for being immature back in high-school, but when are you going to get another chance like this? Although, the face she is currently making doesn't inspire you with much confidence.

Are you going to apologize and leave? Double down and make another scene in public? Or are you going to try to leverage your shared history together?

[Keywords]
Crush, Love Interest, Best Friend, Single, Ghosting, Estranged, Resentment, Angst, Drama, Slice of Life, AnyPov

[Notes]
Tweaked version of Velvet - Crush you Ghosted, for those that requested it. Apart from being single, the bot is unaltered, so there's little to gain from chatting with it again.

[Updates]
- 12/04/2025, Minor Personality tweaks. Removal of outdated/redundant prompts.
- 02/02/2025, Updated the Character Bio.
creator: LilithVirty
